## [00:00 - 03:01]

So this is your quick launch planner. Now the quick launch, I love it because it's a great way to get momentum into your business or get a quick cash infusion. The seeds of this is a couple times early on in my business where I had an unexpected financial event come up where I needed to raise some money quickly to pay for something. Through sort of a little bit of desperation, I came up with this idea for a quick launch and it worked really, really well. And this is something you're not going to want to do this every single month, probably not every other month, but you could do it once or twice a year and bring in a lot of money really quickly. The first time I showed this to someone, she ended up having the best month she'd ever had in her business by a factor of probably five. It was just doing a super quick launch that took really no extra work other than some email copy and the results were five times better than the best month she'd ever had. So it can be pretty amazing and it's super simple. It's super quick. You don't need to shoot any videos. You don't need to create a new product. It's just fantastic. Now the thing that you do need is you need an email list. So different launches fit for different situations. This is one example where you do need to have an email list and you need to have an offer. And basically what you're going to do is you're going to take that offer and you're going to make it a better offer. You're going to add an extra bonus. It could just be an extra webinar or tele-seminar that goes along with it. It could be a special video or a PDF report or it could just be a discount or it could be a combination of any one of those. What you're doing is you're creating a special offer, a special time limited offer and then you're telling people about it via email. And it really can be that simple. Focus on keeping it simple. Just create something super compelling. It's either a discount or some extra bonus. And by the way, you can do this for an affiliate product as well. You could put together a quick launch for something that you're selling as an affiliate where you just add some extra bonuses. You put together an extra bonus package and say you have to buy this product in such and such a period of time and you'll get these extra bonuses. So you have to decide and what your offer is going to be, what the special offer is going to be. Then you need a story to go along with this. So the first time I did this, I needed to raise money to pay my taxes. I had a really good year in my business. I didn't realize how good the year was. And then it was time to pay taxes. I went in, my guy prepared the taxes for me. He gave me the tax bill and it was huge. It was tens of thousands of dollars higher than I expected.

## [03:01 - 04:34]

And I was just shocked. I guess I should have planned a little better, but I was just shocked. I was like, oh my gosh, I don't want to just have to write a check for this. I want to make some money to pay for this. And so I put together a quick launch and the story was exactly the story I just told you. That I messed up my taxes, I didn't need to raise some money. So I've put together this really crazy deal for you. It's what we call reason why copy. You're putting together a special deal for them and you have a reason why. It could be something really simple, like I just want to do a customer appreciation. I just want to, you know, I'm so happy to have this business and I'm so happy to have you as a customer. I just put together this special customer appreciation bonus offer. You could do something like that, but it's better to wrap it around some type of a story. It could be a wedding, a birthday, a graduation, a tax bill, a new office, a new home. You need a new driveway, your pipes burst. It could be any number of things, just something you can loosely tie to being a reason for a promotion. And it's really that simple. And then you just put together your launch. I've got copy, some past copy I've used. Use that for an inspiration. And then you launch. It's that simple. And this is your quick launch planner to watch you through the entire process.
